professionalSummary.intro: Software engineering leader with 15+ years of experience building scalable backend systems and leading cross-functional teams. Currently seeking to leverage deep Golang expertise, microservices architecture skills, and AWS proficiency to drive technical excellence at ANDPAD.
keyStrengths: 5+ years of Golang expertise building production-grade backend services, APIs, and event-driven systems
Strong technical leadership experience leading squads through full project lifecycle from architecture to deployment
Deep experience designing microservices architectures with gRPC, REST APIs, and distributed systems patterns
Proficient in AWS cloud infrastructure with Aurora MySQL, DynamoDB, and container orchestration (ECS/EKS)
Track record of building high-performance teams and mentoring engineers on best practices
